acceptance_criteria: Post with #rust appears in GET /api/v1/timelines/tag/rust; hashtag matching is case-insensitive; pagination works; local=true param shows only local posts with that tag; hashtag streaming channel receives events for new posts with the tag
description: Implement hashtag timeline. Requires a tags extraction step at post-creation time: parse hashtags from content and store in a post_tags junction table (or equivalent). GET /api/v1/timelines/tag/:hashtag returns paginated public posts containing that hashtag, from both local posts and cached remote posts.
design: Create post_tags table: post_id, tag (lowercase). Also a remote_post_tags table for remote posts. Insert tags at post creation time (both local and inbound remote Create Note). Hashtag timeline query: UNION posts and remote_posts filtered by tag. Case-insensitive: store tags in lowercase.
title: GET /api/v1/timelines/tag/:hashtag — hashtag timelines
